channel.title: ammonia borane; heterogeneous catalysis; hydrogen storage; hydrolysis;ruthenium supported over alumina on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in ammonia borane; heterogeneous catalysis; hydrogen storage; hydrolysis;ruthenium supported over alumina on LMI

item.title: Facile Synthesis By Polyol Method Of A Ruthenium Catalyst Supported Ongamma-Al2O3 For Hydrolytic Dehydrogenation Of Ammonia Borane
